title: Superposition: The Quantum 'Both At Once'
description: Master the concept of quantum superposition - the ability of quantum systems to exist in multiple states simultaneously. This is the cornerstone of quantum computing's power.
learningObjectives: Define quantum superposition and distinguish it from classical probability
Represent superposition states mathematically using Dirac notation
Calculate probability amplitudes and measurement outcomes
Understand the difference between superposition and mixed states
Apply the superposition principle to qubit states
Explain how superposition enables quantum parallelism
